source_document: Illinois HB 3773 (Artificial Intelligence Video Interview Act)
passage_text: Upon request by the applicant, the employer shall delete the applicant's video interview and instruct any third parties that received copies of the applicant's video interview to also delete the applicant's video interview within 30 days of the applicant's request. The employer shall not share the applicant's video with anyone other than the persons necessary to evaluate the applicant's application.

obligation.subject: the employer
obligation.action: delete the applicant's video interview and instruct third parties to delete copies within 30 days of request, and not share the video beyond persons necessary to evaluate the application

timeline.timeline_text: within 30 days of the applicant's request

threshold_exception.threshold_condition: deletion must occur within 30 days of the applicant's request

evidence_spans.text: within 30 days of the applicant's request
